title: [Bug]: 含有 `ORDER BY` 子句时有时没有正确排序
description: master分支版本，含有 `ORDER BY` 子句时有时没有正确排序
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_ordering (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_ordering (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL), (4, 'Charlie');
SELECT * FROM test_ordering ORDER BY name ASC;
SELECT * FROM test_ordering WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_ordering_subquery AS SELECT id, name FROM test_ordering WHERE name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
key_bug_features: Incorrect sorting with ORDER BY clause
